series_metadata.series_description: This form was supplied by Job & Family Services to record everything that happens on the Agent’s Covert Electronic Benefit Transfer (EBT) card for Agent’s working Food Stamp Investigations. The form includes fields to have money downloaded to covert EBT coverts, as well as name changes, requesting placement cards changing the address, activating and deactivating an account etc.. . Retained by the Ohio Investigative Unit for internal tracking and auditing purposes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: life of EBT card. ; Electronic: life of EBT card
